title: cordyline cylindrica
intro: Cordyline cylindrica, also known as the cabbage palm or drumstick plant, is a species of plant native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordyline cylindrica include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues.
